name: prompt registry validator rejects a version whose hash field disagrees with the actual file hash
command:
mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'content
' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        file: prompts/x/v1.0.0.md
        hash: deadbeef
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml --check hash 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'hash_mismatch' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
